transcript.text:
Do I know my chicken?
I filmed 3 chicken commercials
You know what makes a fool out of me when I eat chicken?
*Eating is Art
Fingers drenched in grease
But do you know what's even crazier?
It's when you meet someone just like you
Let's see Let me introduce you to the ones addicted to chicken
*Pyung Kyung Jang
A pig that lives to eat!
*Goni
This one put everything at risk for some drumsticks
*Ahgwi
Madam Jung From Chicken University
The famous Kwak Chul Yong
*Dakzza (Parody of the movie Tazza)

Why do people gamble?
I don't know Probably for fun, no?
Well let's see over here though
They are using chicken as currency
Ahgwi, Hogu, Madam Jung
And the one that comes out of no where if food is served: Goni
This game is going to be exciting
I smelled chicken from outside
Didn't you eat before you come here? Your stomach is going to blow up
Don't assume anything I'm just here for dessert
Are you going to like the taste of this chicken?
I have tasted sweet, bitter, and also feces
You've got an attitude
The one that survives the longest wins the game
Your hand is mine if you can't finish it
This is going to be fun

And that's how we started this game Chicken Monopoly
Our lives are at risk right now
Other people are getting radish cubes, coca cola, and sides
But why is Goni keep getting chicken breasts?
Are you going to eat chicken breast all night?
Mind your own business
I'm worried that's why
You don't even have a beverage to wash it down
Don't worry about it It's still delicious
Open up some more radish cubes
Oh okay
Let's play forreals now
Why did you have to say that? This isn't a childsplay
We are playing Chicken Monopoly here
We get the golden key to
Roll the die so we can eat, eat, and eat

Wait a minute Are you kidding me right now?
What are you talking about?
You're not eating this? Do you know how delicious Cartilages are?
Well I don't like it
Show it
Leftovers!
I'll let this one slide, Madam Jung
Let's play it fair and square
And the game goes on
Come on!
Stop it right there Are you not dipping the sauce all the way?
*Chants a curse
Bring in the axe
I was getting too thirsty Please let me off once
Fine
Because you're cute

So he let him go and ate another piece for himself?
It's chilly
The chicken bones are striking the chest
But don't worry
Digesting is faster than pooping
Ahgwi gives a card from under
Madam Jung too
1 for myself as well
1 more for Ahgwi
And the last card for... Stop it right there
Are you doing this again? Doing what?
Do I look like a leftover drumstick to you?
Do you have proof? Proof? Of course
You probably gave me an island
And this card you were going to give to Madam Jung Isn't this the Spicy Chili Paste Chicken?
Now you're making scenarios

Look at your deck
Don't lay your hand on that deck I'm going to cut off your hand
Bring the axe
Do you really need to do this?
You haven't learned not to play with your food?
Alright
I will bet my Soy Sauce chicken with cheeseball that this card isn't the Spicy Chili Paste Chicken
Piss off if you're scared
You're selling chicken to the wrong person
I can see the nervousness in you
Good
I will bet my Fried Chicken and Chicken Gizzard
Tie us up
These people started fighting over life because of some food
The food will get cold if you take too long
Let's check the card now

What?
We had to give Goni all the drumsticks?
You shouldn't have challenged me if you weren't sure You haven't learned that before?
*3 Years ago
I am Goni I looked everywhere to get better at eating
*Chants
Do you want to eat Fried Chicken? Yes
Seasoned Chicken? Yes
I want to eat both
You're good at eating
This is the right drumstick And this one is the left
*Chants
This chant will help me eat more and more
Dipping the sauce lightly
Practicing mixing the deck
How can I possibly eat more?

I am hungry
That's when I knew that he will never starve to death
I really didn't know back then
That he can eat everything by himself
Double it up!
And that's when Goni started doing challenges at different places
Goni, do you want to work under me?
How can a pig work for a human?
Goni, I have an appetite too
I will have no choice but to become a thug if you keep stealing my food!
For Goni, it was as easy as swatting a fly
What is this!?
This pig...
What are you guys doing? Hurry and cut his hand off
Goni, are you really going to do this over food?
You will not be able to use 2 hands to eat your drumsticks

No! No!
I will bring someone for medical care
Move, I'm going to eat it all
Don't go
I will shoot
Do I know Goni?
He used to eat a lot
I ordered it again because it was good Thank you
He was there if a delicious food was there
He was the best at eating
*Be careful of strangers
Can it be?
Goni?
Dakzza (Parody of the movie Tazza)
Thank you
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
